metadata.name: ai.quickdeploy/google-workspace
metadata.title: Google Workspace
metadata.description: Generated Google Workspace Drive read-only MCP catalog manifest.

notes: Official Google API Discovery Service document for Google Drive API v3.
Google documents Discovery documents as machine-readable metadata for Google APIs.

Google publishes Discovery documents for these Workspace APIs rather than a first-party OpenAPI repository; this manifest pins the official source document used for selected read-only Drive operations.

network: GET https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files for selected upstream operation
GET https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/about for selected upstream operation
process: Run pnpm build/test scripts only inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
Run node only as invoked by generated project package scripts inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation

servers.name: com.supabase/mcp

ai.quickdeploy.registry/auth.notes: Supabase hosted MCP uses dynamic OAuth for interactive clients and Authorization bearer tokens for CI or non-interactive clients.

servers.name: com.vercel/mcp
servers.description: Vercel hosted MCP endpoint for project, deployment, documentation, and log context.

ai.quickdeploy.registry/auth.notes: Vercel documents OAuth authorization for its official remote MCP server.

servers.name: io.home-assistant/mcp-server

servers.name: io.sentry/mcp
servers.description: Sentry hosted MCP endpoint for issue, trace, and project context.

ai.quickdeploy.registry/auth.notes: Sentry's hosted MCP endpoint requires runtime user authorization in supported clients.

ai.quickdeploy.registry/auth.notes: Neon documents OAuth for the managed remote MCP server.
